---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new setting, block, or capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the use case or gap this feature would address.

## Proposed solution

Describe what you would like to see added — new setting, new block type, new behaviour, etc.

## Alternatives considered

Have you worked around the problem? If so, how?

## Additional context

Screenshots, examples from other tools, or design references are welcome.
